content.en:
"Congratulations to the Ruler of Qingse!"

Ye Tian congratulated.

"Thank you!" replied with a smile from the Somser Controller.

After obtaining the Black Water Magic Crystal, she was really in a good mood.

Although her status is very high, and she has a master who surpasses the Ten Realms level controller, it is also difficult to obtain such a thing as the Black Water Demon Crystal, and she still has to rely on herself.

And now, she has finally obtained this kind of treasure, which can raise the body of control to the primitive level, and her strength will inevitably increase.

Of course, as for whether she could be directly promoted to the Nine Realms level controller, she was not sure.

But as long as he condenses the primordial-level control body and the will of the transformation realm, he will definitely be able to become a nine-realm level master in the future.

Moreover, she has a solid foundation and hopes to become a Ten Realm-level master.

Unlike many Nine Realm-level controllers, they didn't condense the primordial-level control body and the will of the Transformation Realm at all, so they forcibly walked their own path, resulting in a waste of their own potential, and they could never be promoted to the Ten Realm-level masters.

This is a conclusion that countless practitioners have tried to come to for countless years.

Soon, the auction continued.

Something better gradually appeared later, which would help the Eight Realms-level Chapter Masters, and even the Nine Realms-level Masters.

"The next auction item is the three Wanxiang statues, this time the owner of the Wanxiang statues has a special request, he doesn't want any treasures, he just needs to solve his physical problems. Kitano said.

At this time, an Eight Realm-level master appeared.

"It's the master of Xuantu, how did he become like this?"

Some of the Eternal Masters were taken aback.

At this time, the physical body of the Xuantu controller was constantly collapsing, but relying on a treasure to continue to heal the physical body.

"His mastery is crumbling!"

The Snow Maiden Controller frowned.

The body of control collapsed and could not heal, and this is no small problem.

At this time, the master of Xuantu said: "I have been unable to progress for countless years, I left the Origin Realm Sea, explored in the depths of the Realm, accidentally fell into a special place, encountered danger, and the ninth-level control body collapsed, although I forcibly saved my body with treasures, but I could not heal. I've had a lot of experiments on healing treasures, but none of them worked. It's not an injury, it's the body of control that has collapsed from the root, so I can only ask you, if someone can help me solve the problem, or propose a solution to the problem, the three statues of ten thousand phases will be given directly, and I can also give away most of my net worth. "

"If you abandon the body of control, what if you regain it with your will, or will you reincarnate?"

One of the Eternal Masters suggested.

"No way!"

The master of Xuantu shook his head: "The collapse of this controlled body directly affects the will, our will is already fused with the physical body, so the root collapses, and the will and soul are within the scope of collapse. Once it completely collapses, it will be the day I fall. "

Immediately.

One by one, the Eternal Masters tried to deduce, but they couldn't.

But soon, these Eternal Masters saw that this was indeed not an injury, or a special injury, even the Life Source Water could not save the Xuantu Controller.

"The three statues of ten thousand phases do have a lot of value, but unfortunately we can't solve it!"

Said an eternal master.

"Guys, I can hold on for a while, if you have a way, please contact me immediately!"

The master of the Xuantu pleaded.

He didn't dare to experiment with his own body anymore, so he had to rely on other Eternal Masters.

In this way, the three statues of Wanxiang this time were auctioned.

"The next auction item, Baiye Jinlian, this treasure should not be unfamiliar to everyone, it can make the primordial-level control body improve a little more, the primordial-level control body is almost the ultimate of the control body, although it can continue to improve slowly on this basis, but the improvement is very large, and the Baiye Jinlian is one of the few treasures that can improve the primordial-level control body. "

Kitano said.

"Baiye Golden Lotus, what a good thing!" a Nine Realm-level master showed interest.

This kind of good thing, even the Nine Realms level masters crave it!

And Ye Tian also looked moved, which was also of great use to him.

But.

Ye Tian didn't feel that he had any hope of competing for it, there weren't too many good things on him, unless the treasure that the owner of the Baiye Golden Lotus needed happened to be what he had, he could hope to get the bid.

Otherwise, he had no hope of winning the bid.

"Kitano master, what treasure does the other party want to exchange for?"

A Nine Realm-level master asked.

"One of the three gods immortal technique, the physical body immortal technique, the other party only needs this secret technique. If not, then the auction will be lost!" said Kitano Controller.

"It's this secret art!"

Many Eternal Masters frowned, as this secret art was very rare and could only be passed down three times.

In other words, the Origin Realm Sea only allows three Eternal Masters to cultivate this secret art, and if there are already three Masters who have cultivated, they must strip off their own physical immortality techniques, form a inheritance, and give it to others.

And the eternal master who has already practiced the physical body immortal technique may not be willing to strip his own physical body immortal technique.

However, the golden lotus is indeed precious.

Just when everyone was about to lose the auction, the Nine Realms-level controller Pingyao said in control: "I have the inheritance of the physical immortal technique. "

Then, the Pingyao master stripped off his own physical immortal technique.

Airplanes!!!!

The inextinguishable light of the physical body condensed in his body, and the inheritance of the indestructible art of the physical body within the will was also stripped away, and finally turned into a inheritance light.

At this time, the controller of Pingyao had completely failed to remember the content of the Flesh Body Immortal Technique, and this was the price of stripping.

Soon, the controller of Pingyao exchanged the inheritance of the Flesh Immortal Technique for the Hundred Leaf Golden Lotus.

"Pingyao master, you are really willing to give up the physical immortal technique!"

A Nine Realms level controller said.

"The Baiye Golden Lotus is more valuable to me, as for the Flesh Body Immortal Technique, if you give up, you will give up, if you can't make up the Three Gods Immortal Technique, just a Flesh Body Immortal Technique, it doesn't mean much. Pingyao said.

"I don't know who exchanged the Baiye Golden Lotus for the Flesh Body Immortal Technique, the other party is afraid that he has gathered the other two secret techniques, so he is willing to pay such a price!

"Yes, the Three Gods Controller, what an ancient Ten Realms level controller, it was also a nearly invincible existence at the beginning, but unfortunately it fell in the end! If it didn't fall, maybe there was hope to surpass the Ten Realms now!"

Soon, there was no discussion about it.

Because, another amazing treasure has been auctioned!
